programmer_notes: transport.py: 4-byte length-prefixed JSON framing (8MB cap), bundle={refs:[],inventory:[]}. GossipPeer.serve_once (one-shot threaded server, bind :0, SO_REUSEADDR, timeouts) + exchange_with (client). ingest_bundle feeds each ann through GossipState (drops forged/stale; skips malformed). New: src/gither/transport.py, tests/test_transport.py (4 tests incl. 2-node loopback exchange). 57 tests total. Daemon CLI = future productization.
summary: add gossip transport (loopback-tested TCP wire for signed announcements)
why: P2P layer 4b, the final protocol piece: a pure-stdlib TCP wire that carries signed gossip bundles between peers. The message layer is self-verifying, so the transport never trusts the socket; the full exchange is testable over loopback (two nodes, one process).
